notes: Version 22.3 upgrades the Notes home into a premium session dashboard with stronger current-session context, richer note cards, accent rails, compact metadata/previews, and crisp signal markers.

versions.notes: Version 22.3 upgrades the Notes home into a premium session dashboard with stronger current-session context, richer note cards, accent rails, compact metadata/previews, and crisp signal markers.
Version 22.2 begins the Compose-led premium shell with a true-black OLED studio backdrop, crisp neon rails, waveform marks, and fine grid detail behind the existing app workflows.
Version 22.1 adds multi-version update discovery, keeps legacy appcast compatibility, and shows a premium OLED chooser when several newer builds are available.
